title: Chapter 2395: The True Emperor of the Seas’ Master
content:
Chapter 2395: The True Emperor of the Seas’ Master

"Wait! Let’s talk about this!" The True Emperor of the Seas suddenly shouted aloud, hoping to cease Yuan’s relentless attack for a moment.

However, Yuan immediately rejected, "There’s nothing to talk about!"

And he continued attacking.

Seeing that Yuan had no intention of listening, the True Emperor of the Seas had no choice but to dive toward the depths of the crimson sea to evade his attacks.

However, in the very next instant, it was struck with shock when it could not descend. It was as though an invisible barrier had formed beneath it, preventing it from entering the deeper waters entirely.

"YOU FAT FUCK!" The True Emperor of the Seas instantly realized the reason behind this phenomenon and turned to curse at the Primal Sovereign of the Seas, who was watching from afar with a wide grin on its face.

"LET ME GO RIGHT THIS INSTANT!" It roared with desperation.

"I have no idea what you’re referring to," the Primal Sovereign of the Seas replied, its tone as nonchalant as ever.

The True Emperor of the Seas quickly returned its attention to Yuan and hastily said, "I don’t know what he promised you, but he’s definitely tricking you into killing me since he’s afraid of doing it himself!"

"I am well aware of the risks," Yuan calmly remarked.

"You do not!" The True Emperor of the Seas insisted. "Do you know who my master is?! If you kill me, my master will definitely kill you!"

"Your master?" Yuan halted his attacks for the first time and inquired with a raised eyebrow. "Who is that?"

A hopeful grin appeared on the True Emperor of the Seas after it realized that Yuan wasn’t aware of its master. This meant that there was a chance he would stop attacking if he knew.

"Listen well because I will only say this once!" The True Emperor of the Seas proceeded to announce in a bold and prideful voice, "My master is none other than Morveth!"

"..."

"..."

"...Who?" Yuan asked without batting an eye at this unfamiliar name.

"Y-You don’t know Master Morveth?! Even though you can wield Eternal Essence?!" The True Emperor of the Seas couldn’t believe what was happening.

"So what if I can use Eternal Essence? Should I automatically know every single Eternal in existence because of that?" Yuan remarked with a sneer.

"But Master Morveth is a Prime Eternal! Even if you don’t know all of the Eternals, there’s no way you wouldn’t know about the top ten!"

"Prime Eternal?" Yuan raised an eyebrow at this unfamiliar term.

"This is my first time hearing such a title," he said a moment later. "So the top ten strongest Eternals are called Prime Eternals, huh?"

"You really aren’t aware of this...?" The True Emperor of the Seas was in disbelief.

He’d never seen anyone so oblivious before.

After a moment of silence, it continued, "Now that you know the identity of my master, do you still dare to attack me?!"

"..."

Yuan silently looked at the True Emperor of the Seas before turning to look at the Primal Sovereign of the Seas, who was clearly aware of this and purposefully kept it a secret from him for some reason.

Yet, the Primal Sovereign of the Seas remained silent as it calmly met Yuan’s gaze, almost as if it couldn’t care less whether he knew about Morveth or not.

The True Emperor of the Seas smiled after seeing their weird interaction and asked, "Did that fat fuck not tell you about my master? I told you that he was tricking you! Why don’t you help me kill him instead? I’ll be sure to let my master know of your good deeds."

Hearing such words, Yuan returned his attention to the True Emperor of the Seas and smiled.

"Morveth?" he muttered.

"I don’t care if they’re top ten or the strongest Eternal in the universe! Nothing will stop me from killing you!"

Yuan laughed as he continued his relentless assault on the bewildered True Emperor of the Seas.

"Y-You’re only saying that because you don’t know how powerful my master is!"

"Like I said... I don’t care!"

The True Emperor of the Seas’ attempts at negotiation failed, and with no means of escape, it was reduced to nothing more than prey on the brink of slaughter.

For the first time—despite its immortality and unparalleled regenerative abilities—it felt utterly helpless.

"Fuck! I am not going to sit here and let you humiliate me like this any longer!"

The True Emperor of the Seas roared in defiance, lashing out in retaliation, yet its efforts were desperate, almost pitiful in their futility.

Several weeks of relentless battle passed before Yuan finally muttered under his breath, "It should be weak enough now..."

The True Emperor of the Seas’ regenerative ability had deteriorated to the point where it now required an entire minute to restore even a single tentacle.

"I haven’t used this ability since the incident with Bai Xutao, and since I am not in the Nine Heavens, there should be no issue using it now."

Yuan raised his hand and pointed toward the True Emperor of the Seas, drawing in a deep breath as a strange, unfamiliar energy began to surge from within his aura.

The moment the Primal Sovereign of the Seas sensed that aura, its eyes widened in shock.

"That power! Don’t tell me he’s going to...!" It immediately understood what Yuan was about to do, and its massive form trembled with excitement.

"W-What are you trying to do?!" the True Emperor of the Seas cried out, an ominous dread rising deep within its core.

"I heard that you’re immortal and cannot be killed, right?" Yuan suddenly remarked. "Well, let’s see how you’ll deal with this!"

<Forbidden Blood Extraction!>

Yuan activated Forbidden Blood Extraction and started forcibly drawing out the True Emperor of the Seas’ Blood Essence.

"T-This is—!? It can’t be! You’re extracting my Blood Essence?!" the True Emperor of the Seas cried out in panic as it realized what Yuan was doing.
